tools.name: createContact
tools.description: Create a new contact in the CRM with name, email, phone, company, and other details.

tools.name: listContacts
tools.description: List and search CRM contacts with optional filters for status, company, and text search.

tools.name: updateContact
tools.description: Update an existing contact

tools.name: createDeal
tools.description: Create a new deal in the sales pipeline with title, value, stage, and optional contact link.

tools.name: updateDeal
tools.description: Update a deal

tools.name: listDeals
tools.description: List and filter deals in the pipeline by stage, value range, or associated contact.

tools.name: linkContactToDeal
tools.description: Associate a contact with a deal to track the relationship.

tools.name: managePipeline
tools.description: Create, update, or list SalesPipeline configurations.

tools.name: logInteraction
tools.description: Log a DealActivity or ContactActivity interaction record.

tools.name: searchCRM
tools.description: Full-text search across CRM entities including contacts, deals, clients, and campaigns.

tools.name: exportContacts
tools.description: Export a paginated contact list in JSON or CSV format.

tools.name: manageDealContacts
tools.description: Add, remove, or list contacts associated with a deal, including their roles.

tools.name: manageDealProducts
tools.description: Add, remove, or list products associated with a deal.

tools.name: trackDealCompetitors
tools.description: Add, update, or list competitors associated with a deal.

tools.name: getDealStageHistory
tools.description: Retrieve the stage transition history for a deal.

tools.name: manageContactNotes
tools.description: Create, list, or pin notes on a contact record.

tools.name: manageContactActivities
tools.description: Log or list activities associated with a contact.

tools.name: manageCRMTasks
tools.description: Create, update, or list CRM tasks such as to-dos, calls, emails, and meetings.

tools.name: manageProducts
tools.description: Create, update, or list products in the CRM product catalog.

tools.name: manageCompetitors
tools.description: Create, update, or list competitor records in the CRM.

tools.name: manageCRMCampaigns
tools.description: Create, update, or list marketing campaigns in the CRM.

tools.name: handleComplaint
tools.description: Create or update a complaint record for tracking and resolution.

tools.name: listComplaints
tools.description: List complaints with optional filters for client, status, and severity.

tools.name: getComplaintDetails
tools.description: Get full details of a complaint including timeline and resolution history.
